eventName: Ashramshaala Poshan Jagrukta Karyakram
objectives: To create awareness about Nutrition gardens in Adivasi ashram schools and Tribal families of Pimpalner cluster of dhule district
aboutEvent: A one day workshop cum awareness program was organised at Sukapur village of Sakri tehsil on 18/01/24.The event was inaugurated by Asst Project officer (Tribal) and TAO Sakri. Other delegates who graced the occasion were Sarpanch Sukapur-Smt.Bahiram,Upper tahsildar Pimpalner,Taluka Medical officer, Principal Ashram school Sukapur, SMS -Agri Process Engg, KVK DHULE -Smt.Raut.The programme was sponsored by Indian Oil Corporation and executed by Rashtriya Gramin Vikas Nidhi, sukapur.
chiefGuestRemark: "Sukapur villagers and Ashram school highly appreciate the efforts of RGVN and KVK DHULE in spreading awareness about Nutrition gardens"
postEventDetails: The Chief Guests were given a warm welcome by girl students through a traditional Lezim dance procession.Lighting of auspicious lamp and Worship of Goddess Saraswati marked the inauguration of the programme.After the felicitation of guests,a welcome address was given by Shri Vivek Kumar, Regional manager RGVN. Nutrition garden kits were distributed among the tribal farmers.A lecture on Importance of Nutrition in Human diet and layout of ideal nutrition garden was given by Smt.A.A.Raut SMS,KVK DHULE.A street play in ahirani dialect was showcased at the event. Students of Ashram school were given nutritious breakfast kits. The event concluded with a joint visit by officials to Nutrition garden of the school.

eventName: Four Days Vocational Training on Commercial Goat Farming
objectives: To be aware of scientific management of Goat Farming
aboutEvent: Dr. Dhanraj Chaudhary, Dr. Milind Bhange, Assistant Deputy Commissioner, Animal Husbandry Animal Husbandry Department, Dhule, Prof. Vipul Vasawe, Assistant Professor, Dr. Sandeep Pol, Assistant Professor, College of Agriculture, Dhule Shri. Rohit Kadu, Shri. Jagdish Kathepuri, and Mr. Jairam Gavit Guided to the participants mainly on Introduction to Goat Farming Business, Why Goat Farming, Benefits of Goat Farming, Goat Breeds in India/Maharashtra and their Characteristics, Goat Farming Methods, Goat Breeding and Feeding Management etc., Goat Care, Feeding Management, Male Care, Feeding Management, Animal Breeding Policy, Goat Vaccination and disease management, Also information was given on various government schemes, information to prepare project reports, concept and importance of group farming.
chiefGuest: Dr.Rahul Desale, Professor, AHDS, CoA, Dhule
chiefGuestRemark: Highlighting the current state of goat rearing and its significance for the rural economy. He guided the attendees and challenged maximum number of animal rearers to participate in farmer training and plan by understanding the scientific aspects of goat rearing.

eventName: 32th Scientific Advisory Committee Meeting
objectives: To take review of KVK activities performed in 2023 and finalize the action plan for year 2024.
aboutEvent: Dr.Dinesh Nandre, Programme Coordinator, KVK, Dhule presented the annual progress report of KVK, Dhule and action plan for year 2024 in front of the Esteemed Committee members of SAC. Also All SMS presented their action plan and technical programme separately.
chiefGuest: Dr. C. S. Patil, Director of Extension Education, MPKV, Rahuri
chiefGuestRemark: In concluding remarks Dr. CS Patil said that in the present situation, the organic content i.e organic carbon of the soil is very low and therefore efforts must be made to increase the organic content of the soil. Accordingly, Krishi Vigyan Kendra should try to increase the use of organic fertilizer by creating awareness among the farmers about increasing the organic fertilizer. Also appreciated the work done by KVK, Dhule during last year.
postEventDetails: After SAC Meeting during visit Appreciated the work of Idol farmer and discussed the success formula of the farming in particular buffalo farming and insisted him to motivate the other youth farmers who ware become a rearing the livestock.

aboutEvent: Vocational training programme on Goat farming, the programme was inaugurated with hands of Res. Dr. Illhe Sir,Associate Dean, ACD, Res. Dr. Desale Sir, Principal, ATS, Dhule, Res. Dr. Nandre Sir, Dr. Pankaj Patil , Shri. Jagdish Kathepuri , Dr. Atish Patil, Dr. Dhanraj Choudhari, Shri. Jayram Gavit, Shri. Anil Patil etc. association with Seva Sahyog Foundation, Pune.
chiefGuest: Dr. B. M. Ilhe, Associate Dean, College of Agriculture, Dhule
postEventDetails: Mahatma Phule Krishi Vidyapeeth Krishi Vigyan Kendra, Dhule and Seva Sahyog Foundation, Pune conducted a three-day goat farming training for SHGs women. The said training inaugurated in presence of Dr. B. M. Ilhe, Associate Dean, College of Agriculture, Dhule Dr. Dinesh Nandre, Senior Scientist and Head, KVK, Dhule, Dr. Milind Bhange, Assistant Deputy Commissioner, Animal Husbandry Animal Husbandry Department, Dhul, Dr.Pankaj Patil, Mr. Jagdish Kathepuri, Dr. Atish Patil, Dr. Dhanraj Choudhari, Shri. Anil Patil, Shri. Pankaj Rathod and SHGs Women. During training programme technical session conducted by Dr. Dhanraj Choudhari, Dr. Milind Bhange conducted filed visit at Dalwade Samrudhhi Goat Farm of Shri. Bhausaheb Desale etc.Detail information on scientific management of goat farming was given during skill development training programme. Also conducted filed visit at Dalwade Samrudhhi Goat Farm of Shri. Bhausaheb Desale etc. Also Certificate distributed of the same with Hands of Shri. Arun Aanadkar, Registrar, MPKV, Rahuri, Dr. Illhe Sir, Associate Dean, ACD, Dr. Desale Sir, Principal, ATS, Dhule, Dr. Nandre Sir, PC, KVK, Dhule
